query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agent_conversations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `agentId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255),
  `status` enum('active','archived','deleted') DEFAULT 'active',
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agent_conversations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `agentId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255),
  `status` enum('active','archived','deleted') DEFAULT 'active',
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
